device.usbDescription: Silicon Labs CP210x USB to UART Bridge

dashboardGui.evidence: Dashboard assets, debug snapshot, choice/pet/display endpoints, latest Codex session answer display/publish endpoints, and inbound reply details passed dashboard-smoke. Desktop and mobile screenshots were captured with Playwright.

rePairing.core2RuntimeConfirmation: firmware-uploaded; alpha5 local bridge restart requires closing the admin-owned 8080 process first

codexRelay.command: cmd.exe /d /s /c npm run codex:answer -- --summary "Codex返答表示" --text "..."
codexRelay.evidence: User confirmed the Core2 displayed the Codex relay answer as intended after running npm run codex:answer.

clipboardRelay.evidence: Clipboard relay no longer reads non-ASCII text directly from PowerShell stdout. It base64-encodes UTF-8 bytes in PowerShell and decodes them in Node.js. User confirmed the Core2 displayed the clipboard Japanese answer without mojibake.

fileWatchRelay.core2ObservedFooter: A up / B idle / C down
fileWatchRelay.evidence: User ran the file watch command and provided a Core2 photo showing Answer page 1/1 with the summary, file body text, and A up / B idle / C down footer.

codexSessionRelay.evidence: scripts/codex-session-smoke.mjs validates extraction of the latest local Codex session exchange and queues it as answer.completed without persisting the session body in release evidence. Core2 visual confirmation is a manual-test item.

codexHookRelay.command: cmd.exe /d /s /c npm run codex:hook -- --bridge http://127.0.0.1:8080 --device-id m5stack-sample-001
codexHookRelay.evidence: codex:hook reuses the session watcher in one-shot mode and uses a body-free state signature for duplicate suppression. scripts/codex-session-smoke.mjs covers the hook-equivalent state-file path.

japaneseDisplay.codexAnswerCommand: cmd.exe /d /s /c npm run codex:answer -- --summary "日本語表示" --text "これは日本語の表示確認です。Core2のAnswer画面で文字化けせずに表示されれば合格です。"
japaneseDisplay.evidence: Firmware source and build now use a Japanese-capable font and UTF-8 codepoint paging. Japanese answer.completed events were queued and polled by Core2. User confirmed the clipboard Japanese answer rendered without mojibake on the physical screen.

petAnimation.scaleSpecificFrameSource: source hatch-pet cells resampled per display scale
petAnimation.grayScaleFrameFallback: base frame enlargement to stay within flash budget
petAnimation.flickerAvoidance: Animation ticks set needsPetRedraw only. The pet surface is composed off-screen and pushed as one sprite so body and footer text are not redrawn every frame.
petAnimation.evidence: Core2 firmware with a local hatch-pet asset header generated from Mira was built and uploaded to COM4. The ignored local header includes auto-detected idle frames, scale-specific Core2 frames, and is not a release asset. Firmware source gates verify M5Canvas sprite-buffered pet rendering and pet-only animation redraw. Final visual no-flicker confirmation is listed in docs/gui-tools-manual-check.md.

serialEvidence.logRetention: redacted local logs were used during verification and are not release assets
observedSignals: petScale=8 fallback event queued and consumed

core2ButtonA.evidence: Host Bridge /events inbound contained device.reply_selected after user pressed A on the M5Stack Choice screen

remainingRisks: Core2 touch and swipe physical interaction not exercised
Dashboard Choice/Pet real-device visual confirmation is prepared but still requires user manual check
hatch-pet asset visual confirmation on Core2 is prepared but still requires user manual check
Codex session auto relay visual confirmation on Core2 is prepared but still requires user manual check
Codex hook relay visual confirmation on Core2 is prepared but still requires user manual check
Dashboard latest Codex answer publish visual confirmation on Core2 is prepared but still requires user manual check
Dashboard Display settings visual confirmation for fixed header removal, petScale=8, text size, and animation FPS is prepared but still requires user manual check
GRAY target not uploaded to physical hardware
GRAY IMU tap fallback not exercised
real Codex App internal API is not used; relay uses clipboard/stdin/file/local-session-jsonl input
local 8080 bridge should be kept on the current v0.1.0-alpha.7 process before final manual confirmation
